overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring massive holographic advertisements on glass skyscrapers. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows neon-lit buildings reflecting off wet pavement as the camera moves steadily through an empty urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza toward the city center, passing benches and planters

entered.detail: large fiery orange holographic projection of a face on the left building facade
red neon sign with geometric logo mounted on a building column
tall futuristic glass buildings with illuminated windows rising in the distance
tall black lamp posts with bright overhead lighting
rectangular concrete planters with greenery along the left walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic plaza at night during heavy rain. An enormous orange holographic face dominates the left side of the frame while a red Petrochem neon sign glows on the right. The camera walks forward along the wet concrete pavement, passing benches and planters, with towering glass skyscrapers visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza transitioning past holographic billboards toward underpass

events.description: large blue holographic whale-like creature appears on left building facade, replacing the orange face

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rain as the surroundings shift to feature aquatic-themed holograms

entered.detail: massive glowing blue holographic projection of a whale or jellyfish with trailing tentacles
dark glass office building with grid-patterned windows
bright horizontal light fixture spanning across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the orange hologram gives way to a massive blue holographic whale on the left building. The Petrochem sign fades from view as the path curves slightly left toward an illuminated underpass entrance. Rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflective pools on the concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching underpass with curved architecture

events.description: passing under bright overhead street lights creating lens flares and illuminated rain

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrower section of the plaza with curved buildings on the left

entered.detail: modern building with curved facade and horizontal window strips
dark tunnel-like opening with bright light at the end of the path
embedded blue LED strips along the right edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The blue holographic creature disappears from view as the camera enters a slightly narrower section with a prominent curved glass building on the left. Bright overhead lights illuminate the falling rain as the path leads toward a dark underpass ahead. Blue neon strips line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching busy intersection with dense digital signage and media towers

events.description: approaching brightly lit open area with multiple holographic advertisements and dense urban lighting ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection with increasing density of lights and advertisements ahead

entered.detail: tall curved building covered in multiple digital screens and advertisements
large digital display showing various advertisements on the left building facade
small illuminated booth or vending structure with glowing panels
cluster of bright neon signs and building lights indicating a busy district ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider area approaching a densely lit intersection. A curved media building with multiple digital screens dominates the left side while a futuristic kiosk stands on the right. The path ahead is filled with bright neon lights and holographic advertisements, suggesting a busy commercial district, as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that transitions from a wide open space into a densely lit commercial district. It begins on a wet concrete expanse dominated by an enormous orange holographic face and a glowing red Petrochem sign, moving past benches and planters toward towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera progresses, the orange hologram shifts into a massive blue holographic whale while the path curves toward an illuminated underpass, with heavy rain creating reflective pools across the pavement. The scene then narrows as the blue creature disappears, leading the camera past a curved glass building and blue neon strips under bright overhead lights that illuminate the falling rain. Finally, the walkway opens into a wide intersection where a curved media building with multiple digital screens and a futuristic kiosk signal the entrance to a vibrant, neon-filled commercial hub.
